---
title: "Addresses"
description: "Saved addresses and the active delivery/cart address used by bookings."
icon: "map-pin"
---


Pronto address selection for booking is a cart mutation. `tranquilo addresses use <address-id>` sets the active delivery/cart address; it does not change a profile-level default.

```sh
tranquilo addresses list
tranquilo addresses use 990330
tranquilo addresses show 990330
```

## Subcommands

| Subcommand | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `tranquilo addresses list` | List saved addresses |
| `tranquilo addresses show <address-id>` | Show one saved address |
| `tranquilo addresses use <address-id>` | Set the active delivery/cart address |

## List flags

| Flag | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--json` | No | Print normalized JSON |
| `--no-interactive` | No | Never prompt; fail if more input is required |
| `--active / --no-active` | No | Include active delivery address lookup Negated form: Skip active delivery address lookup. Default: `true`. |

## Show flags

| Flag | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `<address-id>` | Yes | Saved address id |
| `--json` | No | Print normalized JSON |
| `--no-interactive` | No | Never prompt; fail if more input is required |
| `--active / --no-active` | No | Include active delivery address lookup Negated form: Skip active delivery address lookup. Default: `true`. |

## Use flags

| Flag | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `<address-id>` | Yes | Saved address id |
| `--json` | No | Print normalized JSON |
| `--no-interactive` | No | Never prompt; fail if more input is required |

## Agent-safe fallback

Agents should prefer MCP tools. If MCP is unavailable, use structured CLI output:

```sh
tranquilo addresses list --json --no-interactive
tranquilo addresses show <address-id> --json --no-interactive
tranquilo addresses use <address-id> --json --no-interactive
```
